description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human figure with exaggerated features, including a large head, pronounced facial features, and a rounded belly. The figure stands upright on a rectangular base, with both hands resting on its abdomen and legs slightly apart. The head is adorned with a band or headdress, and the facial expression is solemn, with deep-set eyes and a broad nose. The back of the sculpture shows a continuation of the headdress and a smooth, rounded form. The surface appears weathered and textured, suggesting it is made from stone or a similar material. The overall form is compact and solid, with no visible openings or movable parts.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of a stylized human figure with a large head, rounded belly, and hands resting on its abdomen, standing on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's facial features, rounded belly, and both hands resting on the abdomen.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the protruding belly, and the arm bent at the elbow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the headdress detail, and the smooth back with the base visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the head, belly, and arm position.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.

license_info.creator_display_name: Harvard Museum of the Ancient Near East
